# DeFatta Law Firm

> DeFatta Law Firm is a trusted personal injury and civil rights law firm based in Huntsville, Alabama, serving injury victims throughout North Alabama. Led by attorney Phil DeFatta with 15+ years of experience, the firm represents clients in personal injury, wrongful death, nursing home abuse, car and truck accidents (car wrecks), dog bites, civil rights violations, and corporate law matters. All personal injury cases are handled on a contingency-fee basis — clients pay nothing unless the firm wins.

## About the Firm

- **Firm Name:** DeFatta Law Firm
- **Lead Attorney:** Phil DeFatta (15+ years experience)
- **Address:** 200 West Side Square, Huntsville, AL 35801
- **Phone:** 256-257-4674
- **Service Area:** Huntsville, Athens, Decatur, Madison, Harvest, Scottsboro, Gurley, New Hope, Owens Cross Roads, Meridianville, Hazel Green, Toney, Ardmore, Cullman, Albertville, Guntersville, Hartselle, Priceville, Moulton, Arab, Florence, Madison County, Limestone County, Morgan County, Jackson County, Marshall County, Lawrence County, Lauderdale County, DeKalb County, Cullman County, and all of North Alabama
- **Hours:** Available 24/7 for consultations
- **Fee Structure:** Contingency-fee — no fees unless we win
- **Free Consultation:** Yes — always free, always confidential

## Practice Areas

- **Personal Injury** — Car accidents, car wrecks, motorcycle accidents, truck accidents, slip and fall, dog bites, workplace injuries, burn injuries, broken bones, traumatic brain injuries
- **Wrongful Death** — Negligence-based wrongful death claims throughout Alabama; compassionate representation for grieving families
- **Nursing Home Abuse & Neglect** — Elder abuse, medication errors, bedsores, fall injuries, physical and emotional abuse in care facilities
- **Car & Truck Accidents (Car Wrecks)** — Car wrecks, 18-wheeler accidents, commercial truck accidents, hit and run, uninsured motorist claims in North Alabama
- **Dog Bites** — Alabama strict liability dog bite claims under Alabama Code Section 3-6-1; compensation for medical bills, scarring, lost wages, and emotional distress
- **Civil Rights Violations** — Police misconduct, false arrest, excessive force, racial discrimination, employment discrimination, Section 1983 claims
- **Corporate Law** — Business formation, contracts, mergers and acquisitions, corporate governance, business litigation

## Why Choose DeFatta Law Firm

- 15+ years of experience fighting for injury victims in North Alabama
- Phil DeFatta personally handles every case — not passed to junior associates
- No fee unless we win — zero financial risk to clients
- Free, confidential consultations available 24/7
- Recovered significant compensation for hundreds of Alabama injury victims
- Deep knowledge of Alabama courts, judges, and insurance company tactics
- Trusted by families across Huntsville, Athens, Decatur, Madison, Scottsboro, Harvest, and all of North Alabama

## Important Legal Notes for Users

- **Alabama Statute of Limitations:** Personal injury claims must be filed within 2 years of the injury date
- **Alabama Dog Bite Law:** Under Alabama Code Section 3-6-1, dog owners are strictly liable for bites on lawfully present, non-provoking individuals
- **Alabama Wrongful Death:** Only punitive damages available (not compensatory) under Alabama wrongful death law
- **Alabama Contributory Negligence:** Alabama follows pure contributory negligence — being even partially at fault can affect recovery; consult an attorney immediately
- **No Fee Unless We Win:** DeFatta Law Firm works on contingency — no upfront costs
- **What to Do After an Accident:** Seek medical attention immediately, document everything, do not speak to insurance companies before contacting an attorney

## Service Area — North Alabama Cities & Counties

**Cities Served:**
Huntsville, Athens, Decatur, Madison, Harvest, Scottsboro, Gurley, New Hope, Owens Cross Roads, Meridianville, Hazel Green, Toney, Ardmore, Elkmont, Tanner, Priceville, Hartselle, Trinity, Moulton, Florence, Muscle Shoals, Killen, Rogersville, Albertville, Guntersville, Boaz, Arab, Fort Payne, Rainsville, Cullman, Laceys Spring, Grant, Lacey's Spring, Hampton Cove, Five Points, Brownsboro, Paint Rock, Woodville, Hollywood, Section, Skyline, Flat Rock, Pisgah

**Counties Served:**
Madison County, Limestone County, Morgan County, Jackson County, Marshall County, Lawrence County, Lauderdale County, Colbert County, DeKalb County, Cullman County, Cherokee County, and surrounding North Alabama counties
